title: Shadow Crown Totem
description: A dark and powerful custom Totem of Undying featuring a shadow figure with a golden crown.
body:
A dark, intimidating 3D-style Totem of Undying for PvP and survival players.
Shadow Crown Totem is a custom Minecraft resource pack that replaces the default Totem of Undying with a dark, mysterious, and powerful design.

This totem features:
• A shadow-style humanoid figure  
• Glowing white eyes  
• A golden crown symbolizing dominance and power  
• A clean and polished pixel-art look that fits Minecraft's style  

The pack is designed for players who want a more intimidating and stylish totem during PvP, survival, or hardcore gameplay.

✨ Features:
✔ Custom Totem of Undying texture  
✔ High-quality pixel art  
✔ Works with all resource-pack-compatible versions  
✔ Lightweight and performance-friendly  
✔ No mods required  

🛠 Creation Details:
The totem design was generated using SkinMC as a base and then customized and packaged manually into a Minecraft resource pack.

📦 Installation:
1. Download the pack
2. Place it in your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it from Resource Packs menu
4. Enjoy your new Shadow Crown Totem!

⚠️ Disclaimer:
This pack only changes the visual appearance of the Totem of Undying and does not affect gameplay mechanics.                    
Credits:                                                            
• Base skin generated using SkinMC (https://skinmc.net)              
• Pack assembly and customization by anshu078
